**SaaSofSaaSs (SoSS) Engine — AI Index**
Multi-tenant website factory — one Next.js codebase renders unique multilingual sites per tenant via a content block engine.

**Tech Stack**
- Framework: Next.js 16.2 (App Router, Turbopack)
- Language: TypeScript 5.x, React 19.2
- Database: Neon (Serverless PostgreSQL) + Drizzle ORM 0.45
- Auth: Neon Auth (Better Auth) via API proxy at `/api/auth/[...path]`
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + shadcn/ui + next-themes (dark/light)
- i18n: next-intl v4 (8 locales: en, es, ca, eu, ga, fr, it, de)
- AI: Google Gemini 2.5 Flash (translations, image descriptions)
- File Storage: AWS S3 + CloudFront CDN
- State: Zustand 5.x
- Animations: Framer Motion 12.x

**Architecture**
- Feature-Sliced Design (FSD): `1-pages` → `2-widgets` → `3-features` → `4-entities` → `5-shared`
- Proxy middleware (`src/proxy.ts`) routes by hostname: marketing (localhost:3000), dashboard (app.localhost:3000), tenants (*.localhost:3000)

**Key Source Files**
- `src/5-shared/lib/db/schema.ts` — Core tables: tenants, blocks, tenant_entities, tenant_translations, transactions, platform_translations
- `src/5-shared/lib/db/schema/auth.ts` — Auth tables: profiles, tenant_memberships
- `src/5-shared/lib/auth/authorization.ts` — getCurrentProfile, assertTenantRole, assertCanEditContent, assertCanManageStructure
- `src/5-shared/lib/auth/sync-profile.ts` — Syncs Neon Auth user to local profiles table by email
- `src/5-shared/lib/db/platform-translations.ts` — getPlatformTranslations(namespace, locale) helper
- `src/5-shared/theme/ThemeProvider.tsx` — next-themes wrapper (attribute="class")
- `src/5-shared/theme/ThemeToggle.tsx` — Sun/moon toggle button
- `src/5-shared/types/tenants/blocks.ts` — BlockKind union type
- `src/5-shared/config/templates.ts` — Template presets (TypeScript source of truth)
- `src/app/api/auth/[...path]/route.ts` — Auth API proxy with Origin override for dev subdomains
- `src/proxy.ts` — DNS + i18n middleware

**Directory Map (src/)**
- `1-pages/` — Page components (dashboard, site-builder, team, marketing, tenants)
- `2-widgets/` — Composite widgets (SiteBuilder, BlockRenderer, CreateTenantDialog, TeamManager, DashboardSidebar, TenantHeader)
- `3-features/` — Features (manage-tenants, manage-entities, manage-site-blocks, translations)
- `4-entities/` — Business logic (tenant, block, tenant-content)
- `5-shared/` — Infrastructure (config, lib/auth, lib/db, lib/i18n, lib/next, store, theme, types)

**Database (11 tables)**
- `tenants` — Organizations with branding, locale config
- `blocks` — Content blocks with JSONB config + translations
- `tenant_entities` — Blog posts, podcast episodes, awards
- `tenant_translations` — Per-locale entity translations
- `tenant_domains` — Custom domain mappings
- `transactions` — Stripe records (1% platform fee)
- `platform_translations` — UI strings, unique on (namespace, key, locale)
- `profiles` — Local user profiles synced from Neon Auth
- `tenant_memberships` — Role-based access (owner/editor)
- `gallery_images` — Gallery image references with S3 keys
- `hero_images` — Hero background images with S3 keys

**Auth & Roles**
- Two roles: `owner` (full control), `editor` (content only)
- Auth pages at `/auth/{sign-in,sign-up,login,register,forgot-password}`
- Dashboard at `app.localhost:3000/{locale}/dashboard`
- Team management at `/dashboard/team`

**SEO**
- Dynamic sitemap at `src/app/sitemap.ts`
- Per-locale generateMetadata on marketing page (8 locales, OG, Twitter, hreflang, canonical)
- Dynamic metadata on tenant pages

**Block Types (6 implemented, 1 planned)**
- Navbar (3 variants), Hero (3 variants), Blog Feed, Awards, Podcast Feed, Image Gallery
- Contact block — not yet built

**Env Vars Required**
DATABASE_URL, NEON_AUTH_BASE_URL, NEON_AUTH_COOKIE_SECRET, NEON_AUTH_JWKS_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_ROOT_DOMAIN, NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_DOMAIN, GEMINI_API_KEY, AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, AWS_REGION, AWS_S3_BUCKET, NEXT_PUBLIC_AWS_CLOUDFRONT_URL

**Project Status**
- Phase 1 (Foundation): Complete
- Phase 2 (Auth, Dashboard, Team, SEO, Theme): Complete
- Phase 3 (Block dark mode, polish): In progress
- Phase 4 (Monetization): Not started
- Zero tests, no CI/CD, RLS not implemented
